<a id="kind-cabundle"></a>
## CaBundle

Manage OCI CA bundle resources.

- `Plural`: `cabundles`
- `Scope`: `Namespaced`
- `APIVersion`: `certificatesmanagement.oracle.com/v1beta1`
- `Sample`: [Sample](../../../samples/certificatesmanagement/v1beta1/cabundle.md) (`config/samples/certificatesmanagement_v1beta1_cabundle.yaml`)
- `Packages`: Not currently exposed by a customer-visible package.

<a id="kind-cabundle-spec"></a>
### Spec

CaBundleSpec defines the desired state of CaBundle.

| Field | Description | Type | Required | Default | Enum |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `caBundlePem` | Certificates (in PEM format) to include in the CA bundle. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `compartmentId` | The OCID of the compartment for the CA bundle. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
| `definedTags` | Defined tags for this resource. Each key is predefined and scoped to a namespace. For more information, see Resource Tags (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/resourcetags.htm). Example: `{"Operations": {"CostCenter": "42"}}` | `map[string, map[string, string]]` | No | - | - |
| `description` | A brief description of the CA bundle. | `string` | No | - | - |
| `freeformTags` | Free-form tags for this resource. Each tag is a simple key-value pair with no predefined name, type, or namespace. For more information, see Resource Tags (https://docs.oracle.com/iaas/Content/General/Concepts/resourcetags.htm). Example: `{"Department": "Finance"}` | `map[string, string]` | No | - | - |
| `name` | A user-friendly name for the CA bundle. Names are unique within a compartment. Avoid entering confidential information. Valid characters include uppercase or lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens, underscores, and periods. | `string` | Yes | - | - |
